cohesion.diagnosis: Top view clearly shows the counter-bore recess and Bottom view still only shows a shallow bowl rather than a punched-through hole — the central bore is being bridged by hole-fill. Silhouettes (top/bottom) are fully closed where one should see a dark island for the through-hole. Side views remain slightly ragged at the rim with small notches.
cohesion.expected_improvement: Lower circular protection threshold should let the central bore be detected as a real hole and stay open through the bottom, restoring the through-hole.

cohesion.diagnosis: Central through-hole is clean and consistent between Top and Bottom silhouettes - primary intent preserved. Persistent spurious corner blobs (bottom-left of Top, top-left and bottom-right of Bottom) remain, breaking the rectangular plate outline; these are outlier-driven reconstruction artifacts. Side views thin and consistent.
cohesion.expected_improvement: Tighter envelope and higher density quantile should crop outlier corner blobs, yielding a cleaner rectangular silhouette.

cohesion.diagnosis: The stepped cylindrical part reads cleanly in all six views with crisp silhouettes, good Z-rotational symmetry, and clean depth steps between the three tiers. The Top depth view shows concentric rings suggesting a possible counter-bore/recess, but the Top silhouette is fully filled and the Bottom view shows no corresponding hole — so either there's no through-hole (fine) or a shallow blind recess that isn't represented as an opening (also fine for cohesion). Edges are slightly faceted (low-poly polygonal silhouette) but acceptable.
cohesion.expected_improvement: Baseline already cohesive; no changes needed.

cohesion.diagnosis: Silhouettes are clean across all six views: dumbbell profile in front/back, flat rectangle in top/bottom, square in left/right—consistent with a solid bone-shaped part with no real through-holes. Minor blue speckle remains on the right-view depth boundary and a small blue artifact on the top-right corner of the top depth view. Edges are otherwise crisp and symmetric.
cohesion.expected_improvement: Tighter density quantile and slightly stronger boundary penalty should clean up the residual edge speckle without disturbing the cohesive bone shape.

cohesion.diagnosis: Through-hole reads cleanly in Top and Bottom with matching near-circular islands; L-bracket silhouette is coherent across all six views. Remaining minor defects: slightly wavy silhouette on the thin upstand (Front/Back) and softened corners on the Right/Left profile; hole outline still mildly non-circular.
cohesion.expected_improvement: Slightly higher Poisson resolution and tighter density quantile should sharpen the upstand edges and round out the hole outline.
